notes: Exceptionally strong on assumption quality (structuring risk explicitly flagged), success observability (18+ hours → <15 minutes anchored), and constraint completeness (FCA obligation, audit trail, false positive rate all present); slightly penalised on persona specificity (MLRO named but without explicit POCA 2002/MLR 2017 obligation framing) and out-of-scope discipline (SAR filing automation and upstream screening changes noted implicitly but not listed as explicit named exclusions with reasons).
